name: Trident Rod
obtainMethod: The Trident Rod can be obtained at a hidden temple in the Desolate Deep for 150,000C$. The requireme
howToGet:
The Trident Rod can be obtained at a hidden temple in the Desolate Deep for 150,000C$. The requirements to obtain the rod are 100% completion on the Desolate Deep Bestiary and 5 Enchant Relics. Note that any player meeting these requirements can open the door for someone else as it is server-sided, meaning that opening the door is server-wide and allows any player to enter.

To get to the temple, one must swim into a coral and follow a path. Once there, any player can unlock the door to purchase the rod by placing five Enchant Relics on five different pedestals. You can either fish up the relics or purchase them from Merlin, which will cost you up to an additional 55,000C$ (11,000C$ each). The player must have 100% completion on the Desolate Deep Bestiary to place the relics. This brings the total cost to a staggering 205,000C$.

Atlantean Mutation=
Every fish caught with this rod has a 30% chance of having the Atlantean mutation.

Fishes with this mutation take on a dark turquoise colour, and their value is increased by 3x.

thumb|200x200px|A render of a Rubber Ducky with the Atlantean mutation.

Stabbing Mechanic=
When reeling in a fish, each time the fish moves across the bar, the rod has a chance to "stab" the fish. 

This temporarily stuns the fish for the duration of the slash animation displayed on the bar during reeling and provides a small bonus to the catch progress similar to the Piercing enchant.


The stabbing feature is helpful 
on higher-rarity fish, as they move across the bar more frequently, increasing the chances of the rod "stabbing” them. It also helps maintain streaks and secure valuable catches, including Exotic and Mythical rarity fish.

name: Sunken Rod
obtainMethod: The Sunken Rod is a unique mid-late-game rod with moderate stats, obtained with a 1.6% or 1/62.5 cha
howToGet:
The Sunken Rod is a unique mid-late-game rod with moderate stats, obtained with a 1.6% or 1/62.5 chance from Treasure Chests. It is guaranteed to be obtained if the user have opened 50 or more chests, or opens their 50th chest. 

It functions as a greatly improved means of catching Treasure Maps. For every 10 catches, the chances of catching a Treasure map increases by 25%. This continues until the player catches one, then the chances are reset. After 230 catches, the chances for a treasure map to be caught are guaranteed.

It isn't particularly recommended for Fishing, rather it is best suited for accumulating Treasure Maps to use for Treasure Hunting to collect loot. It does however, have better stats than the Mythical Rod, and can be a decent mid game rod.

It also has a unique passive of having a 8% chance to apply the Sunken mutation, increasing the value of fish caught by 4.5x (450%).

description: This Rod was crafted by the Legendary King of The Depths... Legends say, every once in a while the Spirit of the King visits you to hand you a gift from the deep waters!
howToGet:
The Rod Of The Depths can be found in The Depths, unlockable once the player has the full Vertigo Bestiary and The Depths Key in order to open the door.

Two altars need to be visited in order to open the passage to the Rod:

* The first altar requires an Abyssal Relic|Enchant Relic to be placed on its pedestal. It is located near Aspicientis, at coordinates 1210|715|-678.
* The second altar requires a Hexed Relic|Enchant Relic to be placed on it's pedestal. It is located next to Tenebris, and is accessed by ascending the central waterfall opposite the Aspicientis statue.

This will trigger the opening of a hidden stone passage between the two altars, leading you into an underwater maze. At the end of the maze, the player will encounter an air pocket with a statue, there they can buy the rod for C$750,000. The coordinates for the rod are 1689.9|-902.4|1437.7.

Behind the statue, there is a hidden passage that leads to a whirlpool. Entering this whirlpool will teleport the player back to Vertigo.

Ensure that both the Abyssal and Hexed Relic|Enchant Relics are put on the pedestals if you intend to buy the rod, as leaving causes the relics to disappear (if only one relic is placed). You also have to unlock the entrance to the maze yourself, as it is client-sided, meaning it is only affected from the player's perspective and can only be triggered by them.

name: Relic Rod
obtainMethod: The Relic Rod could be obtained from the Archeological Site for 8,000C$. To access it, the player wo
howToGet:
The Relic Rod could be obtained from the Archeological Site for 8,000C$. To access it, the player would first talk to Dr. Finneus and complete the Archeological Site Bestiary. Upon completion, returning to Dr. Finneus would grant the player a Handwritten Note containing an ancient code. This code was used to unlock the gate at the Archeological Site by interacting with the stone plate. 

::Steps
#Speak with Dr. Finneus, the archaeologist.
#Collect 10 Prehistoric fish bones of different rarities. There are: 3 in Roslit Bay, 3 in Moosewood, 1 in Mushgrove Swamp, 1 in Snowcap Island, and 2 in Forsaken Shores.
#Return to Dr. Finneus to receive a Handwritten Note with an ancient code.
#Use the GPS to navigate to coordinates 4045|135|78.
# Interact with the tablet-like stone plate and press the symbols left-to-right in the order shown on the Handwritten Note.
#Enter the gate that opens to find the Relic Rod, which can be purchased for 8,000C$.

The Rod of Time is an early game, craftable rod in Fisch. It is crafted with 5 different parts in the AFK Mines.

The AFK Area can be found at the Moosewood Island at the second island, found eastern of the Flounder abundance.

* Timeless Threading

* Ethereal Glass

The Katana Rod is an Admin Exclusive Rod that can only be obtained during the Black Market admin event. 

== Passive ==
Passive: 5-10% chance to stab the fish increasing the progress bar by 5-10%.

The rod looks like a basic katana with a black handle, grey hilt, and blade with a light grey to dark grey gradient.

The slashes on this rod have a similar gradient to the blade.
